mapper.select: /** UsptExpertReqstHistDao.selectExpertReqstHistList */ select a.expert_reqst_hist_id /** 전문가신청처리이력ID**/ , a.expert_id /** 전문가ID**/ , a.expert_reqst_process_sttus_cd /** 전문가신청처리상태코드**/ , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('RCEPT_STTUS',a.expert_reqst_process_sttus_cd) as expert_reqst_process_sttus_nm /** 전문가신청처리상태명**/ , a.resn_cn /** 사유내용**/ , a.creator_id as regId /** 생성자ID**/ , b.member_nm as member_nm /**처리자명**/ , to_char(a.created_dt ,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as reg_dt /** 생성일시**/ from uspt_expert_reqst_hist a left outer join cmmt_insider b on a.creator_id = b.member_id where 1=1 and a.expert_id = #{expertId} and a.expert_reqst_process_sttus_cd in ('REJECT','COMPT') /*반려 승인*/ order by a.created_dt desc
